title: Thailand cuts visa-free stay period for more than 90 countries including UK
summary_full: Many visitors who have been exempt for 60 days will soon have to apply for a visa after 30 days.
summary_public: Many visitors who have been exempt for 60 days will soon have to apply for a visa after 30 days.
